models.name: Opus 4.8
models.prompt: Summarize concisely and extract key insights. Start with a TLDR. Use markdown:

defaultPrompt: Summarize concisely. Start with TLDR, then a tweetable one-liner. Be direct. No contrastive framing—don't define things by what they aren't. Use markdown:

openInClaudeCode.prompt: Read the transcript at {ref}, summarize it and extract the key insights, then /explain-viz. Save the final graphic image to {out} so it can be linked back to the source video.
